name: DatePicker
description: A comprehensive date picker component with calendar dropdown, keyboard navigation, manual input support, and extensive customization options.
usage_guidelines: Use for selecting single dates in forms and filters.
Enable inputtable to allow manual date entry via keyboard.
Set minDate and maxDate to restrict selectable date ranges.
Use disableDate function for complex date restrictions (e.g., weekends, holidays).
Customize inputFormat to match your locale and requirements.

closePickerOnChange.description: Automatically closes picker after date selection.

defaultOpen.description: Initial open state of the picker dropdown.

defaultValue.description: Default selected date for uncontrolled component.

inputFormat.description: Date format string for input display (dayjs format).

inputtable.description: Enables manual date input via keyboard.

inputtableBlurClose.description: Closes picker on input blur when inputtable is enabled.

openPickerOnClear.description: Opens picker when clear button is clicked.

onChange.description: Callback fired when date value changes.

clearable.description: Shows clear button to reset selection.

firstDayOfWeek.description: First day of the week in calendar.

locale.description: Locale for date formatting and calendar labels.

styling_info.visual_description: An input field with calendar icon that opens a dropdown calendar. The calendar shows month/year navigation, day grid, and supports keyboard navigation. Selected dates are highlighted with primary color.

Do: Set appropriate minDate and maxDate for valid date ranges
Enable inputtable for power users who prefer keyboard input
Handle onChange to update your form state
Dont: Don't forget to validate date ranges
Don't use for date ranges (use RangeDatePicker instead)
Don't disable without providing feedback why
